title: Valeria
html:
Valeria is one of the most consistently recurring people in Yahir's notes — present from 2018 ("papi-woke-up-to-see-valeria-in-year-2061") through the China chapter in 2024 and the May 2025 todos. The pattern of mentions strongly suggests close family (likely sister or sister-figure), but the corpus is deliberately conservative on the relationship label until an explicit signal appears.

The shape of her presence in the notes is logistics on her behalf. The 2022 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream catches "Valeria graduation" inside the broader stacked-column dump (alongside jo, emilio, yesenia, coursework, crypto). The 2024 2024 05 13 things OSU-finals todo list includes the line "Buy plane ticket back for Valeria" — Yahir actively spending energy on her travel from Corvallis. The October 2024 2024 10 22 valeria visit note plans her visit to Shanghai during his China stretch — a full itinerary built around her: Hangzhou, river towns, marriage markets at People's Park, South Yunnan Road foodie street, shanghai tower, 1933 Old Millfun, with Beijing tickets at $80 + $100 budgeted in. The November 2024 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure manifesto's "love like your soul is unraveling" line could plausibly point at her or someone else — left open in the corpus.

The pattern across all four notes: Valeria is one of the people Yahir actively builds his calendar around. Whether sister, cousin, or longtime close friend, she's a stable orbit point — present in every era of the corpus including the China chapter where most of his Oregon ties momentarily faded.

Source summaries

  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — graduation reference
  • 2024 05 13 things — booking her flight back
  • 2024 10 22 valeria visit — full Shanghai itinerary
  • 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure — possible context
  • first batch 2026 04 26 — meta tracking

Connections

  • yahir family — likely cluster
  • shanghai / china chapter — visited him there
  • hangzhou — day-trip plan with her
  • emilio / yesenia / jo — adjacent recurring people
  • corvallis or — origin of her flights
